tagline: Urban Sustainability · Environmental Justice · Data Science
description: We are an interdisciplinary research group studying the intersections of urban systems, climate change, and environmental justice. Our work combines spatial analysis, remote sensing, and community-engaged methods to address pressing challenges in cities worldwide.

cards.title: Climate Resilience
cards.description: Investigating how cities can adapt to and mitigate the impacts of climate change through data-driven policy and design.

cards.title: Environmental Justice
cards.description: Examining unequal distributions of environmental burdens and benefits across urban communities.

cards.title: Urban Data Science
cards.description: Developing new methods and tools for analyzing complex urban systems using large-scale spatial and temporal datasets.
